series_metadata.series_title: Vacation, Sick Leave, Compensatory, Personal Leave Forms
series_metadata.series_description: The file consists of forms containing the employee's name and forms of sick leave, vacation, compensatory and Personnel Leave forms in which time was used. The forms are filed by employee's name.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after retirement or death or until employee would have been 70, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
